companyContext: Series C AI infrastructure company selling enterprise solutions in China and Southeast Asia
teamStage: Scale-up; product org expanding from 8 to 20+
hiringBrief: Find a product leader who can unify platform roadmap, enterprise customer requirements, and cross-functional execution with sales and delivery.
objective: Produce a sourcing strategy, target-company map, and first-two-week search plan.
compensationMix: Base + annual bonus + meaningful stock options
searchReason: Growth hire; current product lead is strong operationally but not strategic enough for the next phase
successProfile: Within 12 months, simplify product portfolio, improve enterprise win rate, and build stronger PM leadership bench
successMetrics: Higher enterprise deal conversion, clearer roadmap governance, lower cross-team friction
stakeholderBrief: Founder heavily values speed and executive presence; CHRO is worried about culture fit and compensation discipline
dealBreakers: Only internal platform experience without customers
interviewProcess: Search consultant screen -> CEO intro -> case discussion -> panel -> references
processConstraints: Need discreet outreach; do not approach 2 named partner companies; final package needs board sign-off
marketSignals: Top candidates currently have multiple options and will compare title, scope, and equity carefully
